title: IFAM 000612B Cabbage Col Combi Combination Padlock, Blue, 20 mm
features: PRODUCT | This combination lock of the Cool Combi model is available in 2 different sizes (20 and 30 mm. base) and in 6 different colours. This series stands out for the smoothness of its rollers, which allow you to program your key with 1,000 possible combinations.
Features | It is characterized by having a body made of aluminum and an arch made of chrome-plated steel. Its opening closing system has 3 rollers of 10 digits each with 1,000 possible combinations.
DIMENSIONS| The Cool Combi 20 model of this combination lock has a body base of 21 mm and a height of 39 mm. The height of the arch is 21mm while its diameter is 3mm. The light of this is 9.5 mm.

CONTENTS | This Cool Combi combination lock is presented in blister packs and with optimal quality. Among its associated services is the laser marking service, which makes it a useful and practical product.

RECOMMENDED| This product is recommended thanks to its different sizes as a safe bet for use in suitcases, backpacks and briefcases, lockers of sports centers, educational, etc. It combines tradition and innovation.
description: From the manufacturer IFAM file At IFAM we are committed to always offering the highest quality in our products and services. Our processes like the products we offer meet the standards that our customers demand. The commitment to quality is a constant in IFAM, so we will continue to adapt to the new quality requirements that the market requires, always in the interest of achieving the maximum satisfaction of our customers. Brand recognized in the manufacture of locks, locks and anti-theft. IFAM offers the standard of its 60 years as a Spanish manufacturer of padlocks, locks and anti-theft for motorcycle and bicycle.
